MetabolicsBiomechanics_2026-05-19

Caitlin Banks

2024-05-14

Setup

Load Packages

## Warning: package 'tidyverse' was built under R version 4.4.3
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ ggplot2   3.5.1     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.3     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.0.2     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
## 
## Attaching package: 'rstatix'
## 
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter

Load Data

netpower <- read.csv("S:/Banks/DynamicTread/Metabolic Data/SummaryData_Control/SummaryData_NetPower_2025-03-20.csv",header=TRUE)

biomechanics <- read.csv("S:/Banks/Vicon/Caitlin/SummaryData_Control/DynamicTread_KineticsKinematics_CBcontrols_2025-04-17.csv",header=TRUE)

asymmetry <- read.csv("S:/Banks/Vicon/Caitlin/SummaryData_Control/DynamicTread_Asymmetries_CBcontrols_2025-04-17.csv",header=TRUE)

biomechanics$Time <- factor(biomechanics$Time, levels=c('first30','last30'))

cross_correlation <- read_excel("C:/Users/bankscai/OneDrive - Kennedy Krieger/Brooke and Caitlin/Dynamic Treadmill/Data/CB Control Study/DynamicTread_CBControls_CrossCorrelation_Averages_2026-03-03.xlsx",sheet='Last30_AvgCrossCorrelation')

delta_netpower <- read.csv("S:/Banks/DynamicTread/Metabolic Data/SummaryData_Control/ChangeData_NetPower_2026-05-15.csv",header=TRUE)

Filter Down to Dynamic Conditions

No open loop No baselines Last 30 strides - first 30 is not a good comparison to net power because net power is measured from last 2 minutes of trial Removing GR0332 and GR0333 for incomplete data/exclusion

biomech_data <- biomechanics %>% filter(Time == 'last30' & Condition != 'Open Loop - Pre' & Condition != 'Open Loop - Post')

biomech_data$Condition <- factor(biomech_data$Condition, levels=c('Fast','Slow','Accelerate','Decelerate','Baseline075','Baseline1125','Baseline150'))

biomech_data_R <- biomech_data %>% filter(Leg == 'Right')
biomech_data_L <- biomech_data %>% filter(Leg == 'Left')

power_data <- netpower %>% filter(Event!='Open Loop - Pre' & Event != 'Open Loop - Post' & Event != 'Baseline 0.75 m/s' & Event != 'Baseline 1.125 m/s' & Event != 'Baseline 1.5 m/s' & Event != 'Post 1.5 m/s')
power_data <- power_data %>% filter(Subject != "GR0332" & Subject != "GR0333")

power_data$Event <- factor(power_data$Event, levels=c('Fast','Slow','Accelerate','Decelerate'))

asymmetry_data <- asymmetry %>% filter(Trial != 'Baseline075' & Trial != 'Baseline1125' & Trial != 'Baseline150')
asymmetry_data <- asymmetry %>% filter(Subjects != "GR0332" & Subjects != "GR0333")

asymmetry_data$Condition <- factor(asymmetry_data$Trial, levels=c('Fast','Slow','Accelerate','Decelerate'))

delta_netpower <- delta_netpower %>% filter(Event != 'Baseline 1.125 m/s')
delta_netpower <- delta_netpower %>% filter(Subject != 'GR0332' & Subject != 'GR0333')
all <- left_join(power_data,biomech_data,by=c('Subject'='Subjects','Event'='Condition'))
#all$Dynamic.Trial = NULL

all_asym <- left_join(power_data,asymmetry_data,by=c('Subject'='Subjects','Event'='Condition'))

delta_asym <- left_join(delta_netpower,asymmetry_data,by=c('Subject'='Subjects','Event'='Condition'))
ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=StepLength_Norm,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Normalized Step Length")

#ggsave("S:/Banks/DynamicTread/Metabolic Data/Figures/SL_Norm_Correlations_.png",dpi=300)

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=StepTime,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Step Time (s)")

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=LeadingLimbAngle,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Leading Limb Angle (deg)")

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=TrailingLimbAngle,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Trailing Limb Angle (deg)")

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=PeakPropulsion,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Peak Propulsion")

#ggsave("[filepath]/SL_Norm_Correlations_.png",dpi=300)

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=PeakBraking,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Peak Braking")

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=PropulsionImpulse,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Propulsion Impulse")

ggplot(all, aes(x=`Net.Power`,y=BrakingImpulse,color=Leg))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~Event)+labs(title="Braking Impulse")

Building a Regression Model

lm_PeakPropulsion <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ PeakPropulsion + Leg + Event, data=all)
summary(lm_PeakPropulsion)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ PeakPropulsion + Leg + Event, data = all)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.8895 -0.3162 -0.0719  0.3028  0.8995 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)      2.765596   0.187673  14.736   <2e-16 ***
## PeakPropulsion   1.108218   0.881929   1.257    0.212    
## LegRight        -0.015381   0.092175  -0.167    0.868    
## EventSlow        0.001924   0.129586   0.015    0.988    
## EventAccelerate -0.063580   0.129265  -0.492    0.624    
## EventDecelerate -0.091608   0.129381  -0.708    0.481    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4285 on 82 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02538,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.03405 
## F-statistic: 0.427 on 5 and 82 DF,  p-value: 0.8286

Asymmetries

all_asym$Event <- factor(all_asym$Event, levels=c("Fast", "Slow", "Accelerate","Decelerate"))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=StepLengthAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Step Length Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=StepTimeAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Step Time Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=LeadingLimbAngleAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Leading Limb Angle Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Trailing Limb Angle Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=PeakPropulsionAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Peak Propulsion Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=PeakBrakingAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Peak Braking Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=PropulsionImpulseAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Propulsion Impulse Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=BrakingImpulseAsymmetry))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  facet_wrap(~Event)+
  labs(x="Braking Impulse Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

# Modeling Asymmetries vs. Net Power

Step Length Asymmetry

lm_SLasym <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ StepLengthAsymmetry + Event, data=all_asym)
summary(lm_SLasym)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ StepLengthAsymmetry + Event, data = all_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.8582 -0.3038 -0.0850  0.2602  0.9631 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                     Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)          2.88319    0.16452  17.525   <2e-16 ***
## StepLengthAsymmetry  0.85151    1.03350   0.824    0.415    
## EventSlow            0.10899    0.23714   0.460    0.648    
## EventAccelerate      0.01335    0.20678   0.065    0.949    
## EventDecelerate     -0.01839    0.20327  -0.090    0.928    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4398 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0236, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.07654 
## F-statistic: 0.2357 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9165
ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=StepLengthAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Step Length Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("[filepath]/NetPowervsSLA_2025-05-14.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)

fast_asym <- all_asym %>% filter(Event=="Fast")
lm_SLasym_fast <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ StepLengthAsymmetry,data=fast_asym)
summary(lm_SLasym_fast)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ StepLengthAsymmetry, data = fast_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.7777 -0.2761 -0.1255  0.3431  0.5602 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                     Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)           3.0891     0.2847  10.851 1.81e-06 ***
## StepLengthAsymmetry  -1.3332     2.6194  -0.509    0.623    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4703 on 9 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02798,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.08002 
## F-statistic: 0.2591 on 1 and 9 DF,  p-value: 0.623
cor.test(fast_asym$`Net.Power`,fast_asym$StepLengthAsymmetry)
## 
##  Pearson's product-moment correlation
## 
## data:  fast_asym$Net.Power and fast_asym$StepLengthAsymmetry
## t = -0.50899, df = 9, p-value = 0.623
## alternative hypothesis: true correlation is not equal to 0
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  -0.6971894  0.4808530
## sample estimates:
##        cor 
## -0.1672719

Step Time Asymmetry

lm_STasym <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ StepTimeAsymmetry + Event, data=all_asym)
summary(lm_STasym)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ StepTimeAsymmetry + Event, data = all_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.80337 -0.33508 -0.05796  0.30035  0.90525 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                   Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)        2.99459    0.14275  20.978   <2e-16 ***
## StepTimeAsymmetry -1.33827    2.21437  -0.604    0.549    
## EventSlow         -0.04519    0.19676  -0.230    0.820    
## EventAccelerate   -0.10922    0.20614  -0.530    0.599    
## EventDecelerate   -0.06695    0.19013  -0.352    0.727    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4415 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01583,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.08512 
## F-statistic: 0.1568 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9588

## EventDecelerate           -0.01367    0.19556  -0.070    0.945

## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4362 on 39 degrees of freedom

## F-statistic: 0.3975 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.8092

Trailing Limb Angle Asymmetry

lm_TLAasym <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry + Event, data=all_asym)
summary(lm_TLAasym)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry + Event, 
##     data = all_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.89858 -0.31259 -0.09786  0.26622  0.91796 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                 2.900757   0.168408  17.225   <2e-16 ***
## TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry -0.345561   0.568741  -0.608    0.547    
## EventSlow                   0.112219   0.276247   0.406    0.687    
## EventAccelerate            -0.002282   0.209735  -0.011    0.991    
## EventDecelerate            -0.007291   0.225788  -0.032    0.974    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4415 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01592,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.08501 
## F-statistic: 0.1578 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9583
ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Trailing Limb Angle Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("[filepath]/NetPowervsTLAA_2025-05-14.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)

Peak Propulsion Asymmetry

lm_PPasym <- lm(`Net.Power` ~ PeakPropulsionAsymmetry + Event, data=all_asym)
summary(lm_PPasym)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Net.Power ~ PeakPropulsionAsymmetry + Event, data = all_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.82083 -0.31933 -0.09393  0.27805  0.90742 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                         Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)              2.97342    0.16512  18.008   <2e-16 ***
## PeakPropulsionAsymmetry  0.03995    0.38776   0.103    0.918    
## EventSlow               -0.03402    0.29558  -0.115    0.909    
## EventAccelerate         -0.07284    0.23500  -0.310    0.758    
## EventDecelerate         -0.09243    0.20992  -0.440    0.662    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4435 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.006879,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.09498 
## F-statistic: 0.06754 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9913
ggplot(all_asym, aes(y=`Net.Power`,x=PeakPropulsionAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Peak Propulsion Asymmetry",y="Net Power (W/kg)")+
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,linetype="dashed")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("S:/Banks/DynamicTread/Metabolic Data/SummaryData_Control/Figures/NetPowervsPPA_2025-05-14.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)

Looking at abs(asymmetry) and change in power from 1.125 condition

# Calculate abs(asymmetry) values for step length, trailing limb angle, and peak propulsion asymmetries
delta_asym$abs_StepLengthAsymmetry <- abs(delta_asym$StepLengthAsymmetry)
delta_asym$abs_TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry <- abs(delta_asym$TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry)
delta_asym$abs_PeakPropulsionAsymmetry <- abs(delta_asym$PeakPropulsionAsymmetry)

Correlation Plots

lm_SLasym_delta_abs <- lm(`Delta.NetPower.` ~ abs_StepLengthAsymmetry + Event, data=delta_asym)
summary(lm_SLasym_delta_abs)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Delta.NetPower. ~ abs_StepLengthAsymmetry + Event, 
##     data = delta_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.08977 -0.31958  0.01739  0.31895  0.78762 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                          Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)              0.575604   0.191145   3.011  0.00455 **
## abs_StepLengthAsymmetry  0.528388   1.865059   0.283  0.77844   
## EventDecelerate         -0.008554   0.205406  -0.042  0.96699   
## EventFast                0.042260   0.205589   0.206  0.83821   
## EventSlow                0.044933   0.197739   0.227  0.82143   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4631 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.008095,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.09364 
## F-statistic: 0.07957 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9881
ggplot(delta_asym, aes(y=`Delta.NetPower.`,x=abs_StepLengthAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Absolute Step Length Asymmetry",y="Change in Net Power (W/kg)")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("[filepath]/DeltaNetPowervsSLA_2026-05-15.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)
lm_TLAasym_delta_abs <- lm(`Delta.NetPower.` ~ abs_TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry + Event, data=delta_asym)
summary(lm_TLAasym_delta_abs)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Delta.NetPower. ~ abs_TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry + 
##     Event, data = delta_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.05206 -0.34127  0.04123  0.26529  0.68730 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                     0.70801    0.18091   3.914 0.000354 ***
## abs_TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry -0.76604    0.93352  -0.821 0.416865    
## EventDecelerate                -0.05263    0.19895  -0.265 0.792763    
## EventFast                       0.10540    0.20417   0.516 0.608592    
## EventSlow                       0.10551    0.20821   0.507 0.615173    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.4596 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02292,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.07729 
## F-statistic: 0.2288 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9206
ggplot(delta_asym, aes(y=`Delta.NetPower.`,x=abs_TrailingLimbAngleAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Absolute Trailing Limb Angle Asymmetry",y="Change in Net Power (W/kg)")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("[filepath]/DeltaNetPowervsTLA_2026-05-15.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)
lm_PPasym_delta_abs <- lm(`Delta.NetPower.` ~ abs_PeakPropulsionAsymmetry + Event, data=delta_asym)
summary(lm_PPasym_delta_abs)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Delta.NetPower. ~ abs_PeakPropulsionAsymmetry + 
##     Event, data = delta_asym)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.10180 -0.31802  0.02222  0.30932  0.76576 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)                  0.66033    0.20433   3.232   0.0025 **
## abs_PeakPropulsionAsymmetry -0.21207    0.66271  -0.320   0.7507   
## EventDecelerate             -0.04727    0.20977  -0.225   0.8229   
## EventFast                    0.07241    0.20217   0.358   0.7222   
## EventSlow                    0.07136    0.21065   0.339   0.7366   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.463 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.008657,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.09302 
## F-statistic: 0.08514 on 4 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.9865
ggplot(delta_asym, aes(y=`Delta.NetPower.`,x=abs_PeakPropulsionAsymmetry,color=Event))+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#ff00ff","#40a6ff","#ff8000","#ffbf00"))+
  labs(x="Absolute Peak Propulsion Asymmetry",y="Change in Net Power (W/kg)")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("[filepath]/DeltaNetPowervsPPA_2026-05-15.svg",width=7,height=4,units="in",dpi=600)

Cross Correlation Data for Speed Profile Matching

cross_correlation <- cross_correlation %>% filter(Subject!='Average')

cross_correlation_long <- cross_correlation %>% pivot_longer(-Subject)

cross_correlation_long$value[is.nan(cross_correlation_long$value)] <- NA
cross_correlation_long$value <- as.numeric(cross_correlation_long$value)

res.aov <- anova_test(data=cross_correlation_long, dv = value, wid=Subject, within = name)
## Warning: NA detected in rows: 37,38,39,40,41,42,43,44,45,47,49,50,51,52.
## Removing this rows before the analysis.
get_anova_table(res.aov)
## ANOVA Table (type III tests)
## 
##   Effect DFn DFd     F     p p<.05   ges
## 1   name   3  24 1.646 0.205       0.114
